code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  mut token = ""
  while i < n and not stop
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if parsed < 0
          stop = true
        else
          sum = sum + parsed
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not stop and not string.is_empty(token)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if parsed >= 0
      sum = sum + parsed
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
